title: MongoDB Data Type Hierarchy
description: A visual breakdown of the primary data types used in MongoDB documents, showing their hierarchical structure and relationship to BSON.
relationships: BSON is the foundational format that encapsulates all data
A Document is composed of key-value pairs using various data types
Arrays can hold multiple values, including other Documents or Primitive Types
Specialized Types provide specific functionality beyond basic primitives
An Embedded Document is a Document nested within another Document's value
